problem id: 36aee03c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(1)

examples:
  11110100 -> 01111010
  00011111 -> 00001111
  01111011 -> 00111101
  00111000 -> 00011100
  00101010 -> 00010101
  00010011 -> 00001001
  11010110 -> 01101011
  10010010 -> 01001001
  11010100 -> 01101010

query: 11100110
predicted answer: 01110011
